  },
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder, StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression\n",
        "from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier\n",
        "from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier\n",
        "from sklearn.naive_bayes import GaussianNB\n",
        "from sklearn.svm import SVC\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score, classification_report\n",
        "import warnings\n",
        "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# ---------------- DATASET ----------------\n",
        "np.random.seed(42)\n",
        "n = 300\n",
        "\n",
        "study_hours    = np.random.uniform(1, 10, n)\n",
        "attendance     = np.random.uniform(50, 100, n)\n",
        "previous_marks = np.random.uniform(30, 100, n)\n",
        "assignments    = np.random.uniform(40, 100, n)\n",
        "internal_marks = np.random.uniform(30, 100, n)\n",
        "\n",
        "score = (0.30 * previous_marks + 0.25 * study_hours * 10 +\n",
        "         0.20 * attendance + 0.15 * assignments + 0.10 * internal_marks)\n",
        "def assign_grade(s):\n",
        "  if s >= 80: return \"A\"\n",
        "  elif s >= 65: return \"B\"\n",
        "  elif s >= 50: return \"C\"\n",
        "  else: return \"Fail\"\n",
        "grades = [assign_grade(s) for s in score]\n",
        "\n",
        "df = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "    \"Student_ID\":     [f\"S{str(i+1).zfill(3)}\" for i in range(n)],\n",
        "    \"Study_Hours\":    np.round(study_hours, 2),\n",
        "    \"Attendance\":     np.round(attendance, 2),\n",
        "    \"Previous_Marks\": np.round(previous_marks, 2),\n",
        "    \"Assignments\":    np.round(assignments, 2),\n",
        "    \"Internal_Marks\": np.round(internal_marks, 2),\n",
        "    \"Final_Result\":   grades\n",
        "  })\n",
        "print(\"Dataset Created:\", df.shape)\n",
        "print(df.head())\n",
        "print(\"\\nNOTE: Dataset is synthetically generated using a scoring formula.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "lXrLFfoH1Qxv",
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "outputId": "a0eea4d1-823c-4f04-d81a-a8987f254b44"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Dataset Created: (300, 7)\n",
            "  Student_ID  Study_Hours  Attendance  Previous_Marks  Assignments  \\\n",
            "0       S001         4.37       52.58           41.83        52.47   \n",
            "1       S002         9.56       76.57           49.50        41.59   \n",
            "2       S003         7.59       77.03           42.39        50.89   \n",
            "3       S004         6.39       81.87           36.21        74.98   \n",
            "4       S005         2.40       86.30           38.44        65.29   \n",
            "\n",
            "   Internal_Marks Final_Result  \n",
            "0           83.08            C  \n",
            "1           31.72            C  \n",
            "2           31.55            C  \n",
            "3           52.65            C  \n",
            "4           64.21            C  \n",
            "\n",
            "NOTE: Dataset is synthetically generated using a scoring formula.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "le = LabelEncoder()\n",
        "df[\"Grade_Encoded\"] = le.fit_transform(df[\"Final_Result\"])\n",
        "\n",
        "features = [\"Study_Hours\", \"Attendance\", \"Previous_Marks\", \"Assignments\", \"Internal_Marks\"]\n",
        "X = df[features]\n",
        "y = df[\"Grade_Encoded\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(\n",
        "    X_scaled, y, test_size=0.20, random_state=42, stratify=y)\n",
        "print(f\"Train: {len(X_train)}, Test: {len(X_test)}\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "MZZ4rzC0AxI0",
        "outputId": "acc96cf9-1a20-4cb7-bf56-5d5c85fe94e4"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Train: 240, Test: 60\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "models = {\n",
        "    \"Logistic Regression\": LogisticRegression(max_iter=1000),\n",
        "    \"Decision Tree\": DecisionTreeClassifier(max_depth=5),\n",
        "    \"Random Forest\": RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=100),\n",
        "    \"Naive Bayes\": GaussianNB(),\n",
        "    \"SVM\": SVC(kernel=\"rbf\")\n",
        "    }\n",
        "results = {}\n",
        "print(\"\\nModel Results:\")\n",
        "for name, model in models.items():\n",
        "  model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "  y_pred = model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "  acc = accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred)\n",
        "  f1  = f1_score(y_test, y_pred, average=\"weighted\")\n",
        "  results[name] = {\"Accuracy\": acc, \"F1\": f1, \"y_pred\": y_pred}\n",
        "  print(f\"{name}: Accuracy={acc:.2%}, F1={f1:.2%}\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "KzJOBIGKA3ST",
        "outputId": "e6029a0d-692a-4709-e2ef-91c42aacef7d"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\n",
            "Model Results:\n",
            "Logistic Regression: Accuracy=98.33%, F1=98.41%\n",
            "Decision Tree: Accuracy=78.33%, F1=78.48%\n",
            "Random Forest: Accuracy=91.67%, F1=91.12%\n",
            "Naive Bayes: Accuracy=100.00%, F1=100.00%\n",
            "SVM: Accuracy=96.67%, F1=96.70%\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "best_name = max(results, key=lambda k: results[k][\"F1\"])\n",
        "best_model = models[best_name]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nBest Model:\", best_name)\n",
        "print(\"\\nClassification Report:\")\n",
        "print(classification_report(y_test, results[best_name][\"y_pred\"], target_names=le.classes_))\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nNOTE: High accuracy is due to synthetic dataset.\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "05uMQPM4ApaI",
        "outputId": "11c07f1f-9431-4e30-f3ff-aea4af9ab18a"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\n",
            "Best Model: Naive Bayes\n",
            "\n",
            "Classification Report:\n",
            "              precision    recall  f1-score   support\n",
            "\n",
            "           A       1.00      1.00      1.00         3\n",
            "           B       1.00      1.00      1.00        29\n",
            "           C       1.00      1.00      1.00        24\n",
            "        Fail       1.00      1.00      1.00         4\n",
            "\n",
            "    accuracy                           1.00        60\n",
            "   macro avg       1.00      1.00      1.00        60\n",
            "weighted avg       1.00      1.00      1.00        60\n",
            "\n",
            "\n",
            "NOTE: High accuracy is due to synthetic dataset.\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "new_students = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "    \"Study_Hours\": [7.5, 2.0, 5.0],\n",
        "    \"Attendance\": [90, 55, 72],\n",
        "    \"Previous_Marks\": [85, 40, 62],\n",
        "    \"Assignments\": [88, 45, 70],\n",
        "    \"Internal_Marks\": [80, 38, 65]\n",
        "     })\n",
        "new_scaled = scaler.transform(new_students)\n",
        "preds = best_model.predict(new_scaled)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nSample Predictions:\")\n",
        "print(le.inverse_transform(preds))\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "df[\"Predicted\"] = le.inverse_transform(best_model.predict(X_scaled))\n",
        "at_risk = df[df[\"Predicted\"] == \"Fail\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nAt-Risk Students:\", len(at_risk))\n",
        "print(at_risk.head())"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",

        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "print(\"Running confusion matrix cell...\")\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "cm = confusion_matrix(y_test, results[best_name][\"y_pred\"])\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(5,4))\n",
        "sns.heatmap(cm, annot=True, fmt='d', cmap='Blues',\n",
        "            xticklabels=le.classes_,\n",
        "            yticklabels=le.classes_)\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Predicted\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Actual\")\n",
        "plt.title(\"Confusion Matrix\")\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "cm = confusion_matrix(y_test, results[best_name][\"y_pred\"])\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(6,5))\n",
        "sns.heatmap(cm,\n",
        "            annot=True,\n",
        "            fmt='d',\n",
        "            cmap='Blues',\n",
        "            xticklabels=le.classes_,\n",
        "            yticklabels=le.classes_\n",
        "            )\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Predicted Label\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Actual Label\")\n",
        "plt.title(f\"Confusion Matrix - {best_name}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()\n"
      ],
